name: Code Style Rules
description: Rules for maintaining consistent code style

rules.name: prefer-const
rules.description: Prefer const over let for variables that are never reassigned
rules.message: Consider using 'const' instead of 'let' for variables that are never reassigned.

rules.name: no-console
rules.description: Avoid console.log statements in production code
rules.message: Avoid using console statements in production code. Consider using a proper logging library.

rules.name: max-line-length
rules.message: Line exceeds the maximum length of 100 characters. Consider breaking it into multiple lines.
